mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_login_attempt (user_id, username, failed_count, lock_time, last_attempt_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{failedCount}, #{lockTime}, #{lastAttemptTime}, #{expireTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, failed_count, lock_time, last_attempt_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time FROM sys_login_attempt WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, user_id, username, failed_count, lock_time, last_attempt_time, expire_time, create_time, update_time FROM sys_login_attempt WHERE user_id = #{userId}
